ShortDescription: Command-line tool for posting on vecchiochan.com
LongDescription: A CLI tool to post new threads or replies on vecchiochan.com
PostReplyDescription: Post a reply to an existing thread
ErrorBodyFlags: cannot use both -m and -M options at the same time
NewThreadExample: vecchioposter new-thread -b b -B "This is a new thread on board /b/" -f file.jpg
PostReplyExample: vecchioposter post-reply -b b -t 1 -B "This is a new reply to thread #1 of board /b/"
FlagThread: ID of the thread to reply to (required)
FlagMsgFile: Path to a file containing the message text
FlagPassword: Password used to delete or edit the post
FlagPreventBump: Replaces email with 'rabbia' and prevents bumping the thread
FlagFiles: Paths of the files to attach
FlagUserAgent: The custom User-Agent to use for HTTP requests
ErrorWinRetrieveLang: failed to get language from both system and registry: {{.Err}}, {{.Error}}
ErrorUnixRetrieveLang: could not determine the system language from environment variables
